meta.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
meta.description: A cycling 28-day, 4-season calendar notepad for Stardew Valley - stay ahead of festivals, birthdays, and crops.

home.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
home.subtitle: A cycling calendar notepad - today's tasks and upcoming events at a glance

dashboard.deleteBody: Delete just this item, or delete the related tasks for the same crop across all dates.

memo.selectDay: Select a day from the calendar
memo.heading: {season} {day}

slots.title: Save slots
slots.hint: Save multiple playthroughs in separate slots on this device (up to {max}).

support.title: Support
support.intro:
This site is a free, ad-free fan tool.
Donations are simply a way to show support—even a small tip means a lot!
support.note:
Donations are entirely voluntary and not required to keep the site running.
The project will stay free and ad-free.

legal.title: Terms of Service · Privacy Policy
legal.privacyIntro: This site (the “Service”) is a non-commercial, static web tool run by an individual. It has no server, accounts, or login, and it does not collect, store, or transmit your personal data.
legal.privacyCollectBody: The Service does not directly collect any personal data such as your name, email, or phone number. There is no sign-up, and anything you enter (schedules, progress, etc.) is not sent to any external server.
legal.privacyStorageBody: Everything you enter (schedules, progress, settings, slots, and so on) is stored only in your browser's local storage (localStorage). This data never leaves your device, and no one—including the operator—can read it.
legal.privacyCookieBody: The Service shows no ads and uses no tracking or analytics cookies or tags (such as Google Analytics). It uses only the browser storage needed for the app to function.
legal.privacyHostBody: The Service is served via GitHub Pages. While delivering the pages, GitHub may collect standard web server logs (such as IP address and browser information) in accordance with its own policy. For details, see the <gh>GitHub Privacy Statement</gh>.
legal.privacyThirdBody: The Service contains links to external sites such as donations (PayPal) and the source code (GitHub). Any data handling on those services follows their own policies, and the Service is not involved in it.
legal.privacyChildBody: Because the Service collects no personal data, it does not collect personal data from children either.
legal.privacyControlBody: Your stored data is entirely under your control. You can back it up via export/import in settings, delete slots, or remove all data at any time using your browser's clear-site-data feature.
legal.privacyContactBody: For privacy questions, please open a <issues>GitHub issue</issues>.
legal.privacyChangesBody: If this policy changes, the updated version will be posted on this page.
legal.termsIntro: The Service provides Stardew Valley–related information as a non-commercial fan project. By using the Service, you agree to the terms below.
legal.termsAccuracyBody: The game information, schedules, and calculations the Service provides are not official. They may differ from reality due to game updates or input errors, and the operator makes no express or implied warranty as to their accuracy, completeness, or timeliness.
legal.termsServiceBody: The Service is provided free of charge and may be temporarily interrupted, changed, or discontinued due to third-party infrastructure (hosting, etc.) or the operator's circumstances. The operator is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from this.
legal.termsUserBody: You are responsible for managing the data you enter and save. Because data is stored only on your device, it may be lost by clearing browser data or changing devices. Please back up important data yourself via export.
legal.termsProhibitBody: Conduct that interferes with the normal operation of the Service (for example, automated bulk requests or exploiting vulnerabilities) is prohibited.
legal.copyrightIntro: The Service is an unofficial, fan-made tool to help you play the game Stardew Valley.
legal.copyrightAffiliationBody: The Service is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or approved by ConcernedApe or Stardew Valley. It may differ from the game's official information.
legal.copyrightIpBody: Stardew Valley content, names, and images are trademarks and copyrights of ConcernedApe, and the Service uses them solely for non-commercial fan purposes. Some data is adapted from the <wiki>Stardew Valley Wiki</wiki> (<license>CC BY-NC-SA 3.0</license>).
legal.copyrightCodeBody: Source code originally written for the Service is available on <repo>GitHub</repo> under the MIT License (game assets and data follow the copyright notice above). However, the Min-Max guide portion below is licensed under GPL-3.0, so any build distributed with it includes GPL-3.0 components.
legal.copyrightGuideBody: The multilingual translations and restructured data behind the "Min-Max Guide" feature are a derivative work of the <guide>Stardew Valley Min-Max Guide</guide> by BlackSight6 & Zamiel, and—like the original—are licensed under the <gpl>GNU GPL-3.0</gpl>. The original was modified by translating it into 12 languages (English, Korean, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Hungarian, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese, Russian, Turkish, and Simplified Chinese) and restructuring it into per-day data. The Corresponding Source for this portion is available in the <repo>public repository</repo> above, and anyone may use, redistribute, and modify it under the terms of GPL-3.0. This GPL portion is kept in a separate file from the wiki (CC BY-NC-SA) material and distributed as a mere aggregation.
legal.copyrightDisclaimerBody: All information and features are provided “as is,” with no warranty of accuracy or completeness. Use of the Service is entirely at your own risk, and the operator is not liable for any damages or data loss arising from its use.

settings.title: Settings
settings.mainTabDesc: Choose what to show on the main screen and in what order.
settings.reportDesc: Found a bug or have an idea for improvement? Let us know.
settings.reportNote: A GitHub account is required to post.
settings.dataDesc: Export your settings and progress to a file, or import that file on another device.
settings.exportSlotNote: Exports data from the current slot “{name}”.
settings.importSuccess: Imported! Your data has been applied.
settings.importError: Import failed: not a valid backup file.
settings.resetDesc: Restores all saved data (bundles, tasks, etc.) to defaults. This cannot be undone.
settings.orderHint: Drag the ⠿ handle to reorder; check to show/hide.
settings.cropGroupNote: Plant → water → harvest → eat. Each step appears only after the previous is done.
settings.bundleTrackerNote: Shows the bundle tracker box at the top of the main screen.
settings.shopScheduleShowNote: Shows schedules pinned in Info - Shop schedule at the top of the main screen.
settings.rainFishShowNote: On days with a rain forecast, shows fish catchable only in the rain for that season at the top of the main screen.

blacksmith.pickupWarn: Blacksmith is closed on the ready day {ready} ({reason}); you'll pick it up the next open day

carpenter.tuesday: Carpenter's Shop is closed on Tuesdays
carpenter.festival: Carpenter's Shop is closed on festival days
carpenter.checkup: Closed on Summer 18 for Robin's checkup

bundle.title: Community Center bundles
bundle.qualityGoldNote: Every item must be submitted at gold quality (★) or higher.
bundle.needMetLock: Required count reached. Uncheck another item to select this one.
bundle.excludeUnobtainable: Exclude items not obtainable this season
bundle.hiddenNote: Items not obtainable this season are under 'Show all'
bundle.seasonNeedsNone: No items left to gather this season

bundleTracker.title: Bundle Tracker
bundleTracker.emptyRemix: No random bundles selected. Choose bundles in the Remix tab.

addTask.title: Add task
addTask.geodeMemo: Crack geodes - take ore geodes to the Blacksmith (Clint) to open
addTask.museumMemo: Donate to museum - donate newly found minerals and artifacts to the museum (Gunther)
addTask.wiltWarning: Won't mature this season - may wilt at season end
addTask.noSeasonCrops: No crops can be planted this season
addTask.wateringNote: Daily watering items are auto-added until harvest (regrow crops: until season end)
addTask.stagePlantNote: Off = treat as already planted; start from the next stage
addTask.stageWaterNote: Daily watering until harvest (turn off when using sprinklers)
addTask.stageHarvestNote: Off = stop after the last watering (no harvest task)
addTask.stageEatFoodNote: Eat a quality-buff food on harvest day
addTask.eatFoodMemo: Eat food on {crop} harvest day (quality buff)
addTask.greenhouseNote: Shows crops of every season and they never wilt at season end.
addTask.fruitGreenhouseNote: Greenhouse trees bear fruit year-round regardless of season.
addTask.fruitRepeatYearlyNote: When you advance to a new year, that year's harvest schedule is added automatically. Turn off to show only the first year.
addTask.fruitHarvestHint: Harvest reminder every 3 days during {season} (tree holds up to 3)
addTask.fruitHarvestGreenhouseHint: Harvest reminder every 3 days year-round (tree holds up to 3)
addTask.fruitHarvestIntro: Adds a harvest schedule, treating the tree as already fully grown.
addTask.fruitNextSeasonNote: This tree bears fruit in {season}. The harvest schedule starts from the nearest {season}.
addTask.allHidden: No items to show. Re-enable them in Options.
addTask.optionsHint: Unchecked items are hidden from the Add Task menu.
addTask.optionsTreeHint: Check to show / expand sub-items with ▶, drag ⠿ to reorder (the order shown in Add Task).
addTask.repeatNote: When collected, re-adds the same start task that day.

info.title: Info
info.birthdayGiftHint: Pick a villager to see their favorite gifts.
info.moviePrefHint: Pick a villager to see their favorite movies and snacks.

movie.source: Source: Stardew Valley Wiki Movie Theater (CC BY-NC-SA 3.0)

rainFish.title: Rainy-day fish
rainFish.empty: No fish are catchable only in the rain this season.

fish.title: Fish info
fish.rainOnlyToggle: Show fish catchable only on rainy days
fish.excludeUnobtainable: Exclude fish not catchable this season

seedEfficiency.title: Seed efficiency
seedEfficiency.qualityHint: Crop quality is set on harvest day - eating a Farming-buff food on harvest day raises quality. Set farming/foraging level and skills in Character settings.
seedEfficiency.note: Relative revenue (max = 100%). Reflects season, processing, fertilizer, food and character (level·skills); ignores seed cost, seed source and processing time. Keg/jar goods do not apply quality or Tiller.

shopSchedule.title: Shop schedule
shopSchedule.festivalExceptionNote: Most shops are closed on festival days. Exceptions (open as usual): Spirit's Eve, Dance of the Moonlight Jellies, Desert Festival, Trout Derby, SquidFest, Night Market.
shopSchedule.boxEmpty: Pin schedules in Info → Shop schedule to show them here.
shopSchedule.source: Source: Stardew Valley Wiki - Shop Schedules (CC BY-NC-SA 3.0)

fishShop.name: Fish Shop
fishShop.note:
Open on rainy Saturdays.
Only 9–10 AM on Spring 9.

clinic.name: Harvey's Clinic
clinic.note: Closed Saturdays. Until 2 PM on Tue/Thu; until 12 PM on Sun/Mon/Wed/Fri.

joja.name: JojaMart
joja.note: Permanently closes after Community Center bundles are completed.

oasis.name: Oasis & Casino
oasis.festival: Closed except Winter 25 (Feast of the Winter Star)
oasis.note: On Spring 25 (Pam's checkup) use Warp Totem: Desert or the Desert Obelisk.

saloon.name: Stardrop Saloon
saloon.note: On Fall 4 (Gus's checkup) opens at 12 PM but usable only after Gus returns at 4:30 PM.

wizardTower.name: Wizard's Tower
wizardTower.note: Accessible after 11 PM via the Witch's Hut.

desertTrader.name: Desert Trader
desertTrader.note: On Spring 25 (Pam's checkup) use Warp Totem: Desert or the Desert Obelisk.

character.title: Character settings
character.hint: Used for growth and quality in seed efficiency.

myTasks.title: My added tasks
myTasks.emptyFuture: No upcoming or rolled-over tasks to show
myTasks.futureOnly: Upcoming only (uncheck to also show earlier tasks)

weatherFortune.title: Check weather & fortune
weatherFortune.detail: Check tomorrow's weather forecast and the daily luck (fortune) on TV

animalCare.title: Tend animals
animalCare.detail: Pet, feed, and collect produce to keep friendship and quality up

farmCave.title: Mushroom cave harvest
farmCave.detail: Mushrooms regrow daily at 3:40 PM, harvest after that. Available daily (unlike the fruit cave, which doesn't generate daily)

hardwood.title: Harvest hardwood
hardwood.detail: Cut the hardwood stumps in the Secret Woods

travelingCart.title: Check Traveling Cart stock
travelingCart.detail: Fri & Sun, 6:00 AM–8:00 PM / Night Market (Winter 15–17) daily, 5:00 PM–2:00 AM

krobusSprinkler.title: Buy Iridium Sprinkler (Krobus)
krobusSprinkler.detail: Friday, buy an Iridium Sprinkler from the Sewers for automation (not on festival days)

desertTraderStaircase.title: Buy Staircase (Desert Trader)
desertTraderStaircase.detail: Sunday, trade Jade for Staircases to prep for the Skull Cavern

buySeeds.title: New season
buySeeds.detail: A new season has begun - you can buy this season's crop seeds

helpWanted.title: Check Help Wanted board
helpWanted.detail: Check the Help Wanted requests (delivery, gathering, etc.) at Pierre's board
helpWanted.eveWarning: Tomorrow is a festival - NPCs and shops are unavailable

forageWeekly.title: Gather forage
forageWeekly.detail: Saturday · Collect forageables around the valley. Forage resets on Sunday, so Saturday is most efficient.

crabPot.title: Check crab pots
crabPot.detail: Collect from crab pots and re-bait them

pondCheck.title: Check fish pond
pondCheck.detail: Collect the roe and produce that accumulate in the pond basket each day

specialOrders.title: Check Special Orders board
specialOrders.detail: Monday, accept new Special Orders at the town and Mr. Qi boards

queenOfSauceNew.title: Queen of Sauce (new episode)
queenOfSauceNew.detail: Sunday - check the new cooking recipe on TV

queenOfSauceRerun.title: Queen of Sauce (rerun)
queenOfSauceRerun.detail: Wednesday - rerun of the cooking recipe on TV
queenOfSauceRerun.note: If you don't check Sunday's new airing, the Wednesday rerun is shown.

minMax.title: Min-Max Guide Mode
minMax.noGuide: There is no guide entry for this date.

footer.fan: An unofficial fan project, not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe / Stardew Valley.
footer.data: Game names and translations are extracted from the game files; some data is adapted from the <wiki>Stardew Valley Wiki</wiki> (<license>CC BY-NC-SA 3.0</license>).
footer.code: Source code is available on <repo>GitHub</repo> under the MIT license.
footer.nonCommercial: This site is operated on a non-commercial basis.

gift.birthdayHint: Giving a loved or liked gift on a birthday grants 8x friendship.

details.d02: All fruit (except Ancient Fruit, Mango, Salmonberry & Spice Berry)
details.d03: All fruit (except Ancient Fruit, Salmonberry & Spice Berry)
details.d04: All fruit (except Ancient Fruit, Grape, Melon & Salmonberry)
details.d10: All fruit (except Blackberry, Cactus Fruit, Coconut, Ancient Fruit, Hot Pepper & Salmonberry)
details.d11: All fruit (Blackberry, Crystal Fruit, Ancient Fruit, Salmonberry & Strawberry)
details.d14: All fruit (except Cactus Fruit, Ancient Fruit & Salmonberry)
details.d18: All flowers (except Poppy, which is universally hated)
details.d21: All eggs (except Ostrich Egg & Void Egg)
details.d22: All mushrooms (except Red Mushroom & Purple Mushroom)
details.d24: All mushrooms (except Common Mushroom & Red Mushroom)
details.d25: All gems (except Prismatic Shard, which is universally loved)
details.d29: All fish (Carp, Catfish, Lingcod, Octopus, Sea Cucumber, Snail, Sturgeon & Tiger Trout)
details.d30: All fish (except Carp, Octopus, Snail & Squid)
details.d31: All fish (except Carp, Lobster, Octopus, Sea Cucumber, Snail & Squid)
details.d33: All vegetables, including Fiddlehead Fern (except Hops, Tea Leaves & Wheat, which are universally neutral, and Unmilled Rice, which is universally disliked); plus Life Elixir, Maple Syrup & Piña Colada
details.d34: All vegetables, including Fiddlehead Fern (except Hops, Tea Leaves & Wheat, which are universally neutral, and Unmilled Rice, which is universally disliked)
details.d35: All cooked dishes (except Fried Egg & Bread, which are universally neutral, and Strange Bun & Seafoam Pudding, which are universally hated)
details.d39: All artisan goods (except Oil, which is universally disliked, and Void Mayonnaise, which is universally hated)
details.d41: All foraged minerals (Quartz varies by villager)

a7.name: A New Friend
a7.desc: Reach a 5-heart friend level with someone.

a8.name: Best Friends
a8.desc: Reach a 10-heart friend level with someone.

a9.name: The Beloved Farmer
a9.desc: Reach a 10-heart friend level with 8 people.

a10.name: Cliques
a10.desc: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 4 people.

a11.name: Networking
a11.desc: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 10 people.

a12.name: Popular
a12.desc: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 20 people.

a17.name: Living Large
a17.desc: Upgrade your house to the maximum size.

a25.name: Treasure Trove
a25.desc: Donate 40 different items to the museum.

a31.name: Prairie King
a31.desc: Win a game of 'Journey of the Prairie King'.

a32.name: The Bottom
a32.desc: Reach the bottom of the mines.

a33.name: Local Legend
a33.desc: Restore the Community Center in Pelican Town.

a34.name: Joja Co. Member Of The Year
a34.desc: Complete all Joja community development projects.

a36.name: Full House
a36.desc: Get married and have two children.

a37.name: Singular Talent
a37.desc: Reach skill level 10 in a skill.

a38.name: Master Of The Five Ways
a38.desc: Reach skill level 10 in every skill.

a39.name: Protector Of The Valley
a39.desc: Complete all of the Adventurer's Guild monster eradication goals.

a40.name: Fector's Challenge
a40.desc: Clear 'Journey of the Prairie King' without dying. (Hidden achievement)

a44.name: Blue Ribbon
a44.desc: Get 1st place in the Stardew Valley Fair competition.

a46.name: Good Neighbors
a46.desc: Help your forest neighbors grow their family.

a47.name: Danger In The Deep
a47.desc: Reach the bottom of the 'dangerous' mines.

fieldOffice.title: Field Office Donations
fieldOffice.hint: Fossils and surveys donated to Professor Snail on Ginger Island.

logic.weatherFortune: Daily · ends same day (otherwise new weather/fortune next day). Regenerated next day even if not completed.
logic.animalCare: Daily · ends same day. Must be redone each day.
logic.farmCave: Mushrooms regrow daily at 3:40 PM · accumulate until collected (can be deferred).
logic.hardwood: Daily · ends same day (Secret Woods stumps).
logic.travelingCart: Weekly Fri/Sun (+Night Market daily) · disappears if not done that day.
logic.krobusSprinkler: Every Friday · disappears if not done that day. Except on festival days.
logic.desertTraderStaircase: Every Sunday · disappears if not done that day.
logic.specialOrders: Refreshes every Monday · can be deferred until the next Monday.
logic.queenOfSauceNew: New episode on Sunday · if not watched (unchecked), the same recipe can only be seen again as the Wednesday rerun. Ends same day.
logic.queenOfSauceRerun: Wednesday rerun · shown only if you missed the new episode. Ends same day.
logic.helpWanted: Daily · ends same day. Not shown the day before or on a festival, since shops/NPCs are blocked.
logic.forageWeekly: Every Saturday · ends same day. Forage resets on Sunday, so Saturday is most efficient.
logic.pondCheck: Daily · ends same day (produce accumulates in the pond basket each day).
logic.festival: Info · festival day (affects shop/NPC schedules). No completion mark.
logic.cropDeadline: Info · must be planted by this day to harvest this season. No completion mark.
logic.foraging: Info · seasonal foraging period (salmonberry season, etc.). No completion mark.
logic.birthday: Same day only · must be delivered today to count as a 'birthday gift'. Otherwise it becomes an ordinary gift.
logic.newSeason: Info · start of a new season (this season's seeds available). No completion mark.
logic.plant: Deferred until planted · once planted, watering/harvest appear. Without a greenhouse it disappears after the harvest season.
logic.harvest: Created once all watering is done · deferred if not harvested. Without a greenhouse it disappears after the harvest season.
logic.watering: Once a day after planting · if not watered it's pushed back, and so is the harvest. Without a greenhouse it disappears once harvest becomes impossible.
logic.fruit: Indefinite · deferred if not harvested (up to 3 accumulate). Without a greenhouse it disappears after the season.
logic.tool: Indefinite · deferred until dropped off for upgrade (reflects Blacksmith days off).
logic.machine: Indefinite · deferred until the equipment is used/collected. Collection is created after the previous step is used.
logic.build: Indefinite · deferred until built (reflects required materials and Carpenter's Shop days off).
logic.eatFood: Harvest day · must be eaten before harvesting. Automatically removed if you check the crop harvest first.

costMaterials.title: Purchase prices
costMaterials.hint: Pick a shop to see each item's purchase price and materials.

notes.wednesdayBait: Random fish or Magnet bait, Wednesdays only
notes.krobusSingle: Only one, at max friendship with Krobus while single
